steps.title: Forecast
steps.body: Call real-world markets across sports, politics, crypto and more. Every forecast sharpens your Edge Score.

steps.title: Compete
steps.body: Jump into a live tournament and climb the standings. Sharper forecasts rank higher — no entry fee, no staking.

steps.title: Win
steps.body: Finish near the top when the tournament ends and win real cash, paid straight out.
